title: Scheduled Task XML Import
description: Detects importing scheduled tasks from XML files, which may bypass task creation monitoring.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (('Process Name' like '*\\schtasks.exe' and ('Command Line' like '*/create*' and 'Command Line' like '*/xml*')))
